hierarchy.h1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none text-slate-900
hierarchy.h3: font-sans text-xl md:text-2xl font-medium tracking-tight text-slate-900
hierarchy.overline: font-sans text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-slate-500

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_pages: Use bento grid mode A. Wide gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_pages: Dense control room grid mode B. gap-6. Strict hierarchy.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px subtle border on most cards (border-gray-200), minimal soft shadow.

components.Navbar.jsx: Solid white background, sticky top-0, z-50, border-b border-gray-200. Clear logo, 3-5 nav links. Primary CTA button (Apply).
components.Sidebar.jsx: Dashboard navigation. Background #F8F9FA, right border. Links have hover state (bg-gray-100) and active state (bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 font-semibold).
components.Card.jsx: Flat solid surfaces. border border-gray-200, bg-white, rounded-sm or rounded-md. p-6 or p-8. No excessive box-shadows. Clean and crisp.
components.Button.jsx: Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002080] rounded-sm transition-colors. Secondary: border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50. Ghost: text-[#002FA7] hover:bg-blue-50.
components.StatusBadge.jsx: Pill shape, rounded-full, text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold px-2.5 py-1. Use status colors (e.g., text-green-800 bg-green-100 for 'Admitted', text-amber-800 bg-amber-100 for 'Under Review').

pages.Home.jsx: Marketing landing page. High visual impact. Hero section with `hero_university` image (max overlay black/30), large serif heading. Bento grid for features.
pages.Login.jsx: Split layout: Left side clean form, right side `login_background` image covering full height. Form should use Shadcn inputs.
pages.Register.jsx: Similar to Login.jsx split layout but with registration fields.
pages.Dashboard.jsx: Student overview. Metrics: 'Days to decision', 'Documents submitted'. Grid with 'Application Status' and 'Next Steps' list.
pages.Apply.jsx: Multi-stage application form. Top stepper progress bar. Clean, single-column layout max-w-2xl. Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select.
pages.Track.jsx: Vertical timeline tracking stages: 'Application Submitted', 'Under Review', 'Interview Scheduled', 'Final Decision'. Use icons.
pages.Documents.jsx: Upload dashboard. Grid of required documents. Status badges on each. A drag-and-drop zone at top.
pages.AdminDashboard.jsx: Dense data view. Wide table mapping Applicants, Target Major, Status, Actions. Use Shadcn Table component. Filters above table.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `lucide-react` and `framer-motion` if not already installed.
Use standard HTML tags (`div`, `section`) for high-level layouts; only use Shadcn components for complex interactive pieces.
Never use generic sans fonts for H1/H2 headings. Always apply the 'font-serif' class, configure tailwind to use 'Cormorant Garamond'.
Body should use 'Outfit' font. Ensure Tailwind config handles these font families.
Apply solid border styles (e.g. border border-gray-200) rather than heavy box shadows for cards and sections.
Ensure all text contrast passes APCA standards; text on buttons should explicitly state text color on hover.
Use the provided image URLs strictly. No placeholders allowed.
Components to create/modify are .jsx files as requested by the original problem statement.
